description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring a fitted t-shirt with printed text on the chest and back, slim pants, and low-top sneakers. The figure's arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and the hands are open with fingers naturally spaced. The head is adorned with long, wavy hair that drapes over one shoulder, giving a distinctive and modern look. The t-shirt fits closely to the torso, and the pants are tapered, ending just above the ankles. The shoes are simple and athletic in style, suitable for walking or everyday city activities. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral, upright stance.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a fitted t-shirt, slim pants, sneakers, and long wavy hair, standing upright with arms slightly extended. The figure has a modern, urban appearance and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the t-shirt's chest print, relaxed arms, and the long hair draped over the left shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the hair's length, and the slim fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the t-shirt's back print, the full length of the hair, and the back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the hair falling behind the shoulder and the side profile of the body and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and slim pants with athletic footwear
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair draped over one shoulder
